mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD as propCd, PROP_SHRT_NM as propShrtNm, PROP_FULL_NM as propFullNm FROM PMS_PROPERTY ORDER BY PROP_CD
SELECT PROP_CD as propCd, CMPX_CD as cmpxCd, CMPX_NM as cmpxNm, CMPX_TP as cmpxTp, DECRYPT_AES256(CMPX_REPR_TEL) as cmpxReprTel FROM PMS_COMPLEX ORDER BY PROP_CD, CMPX_CD
